name: Provider System Refactor
description: Refactor AI provider architecture with auto-fallback registry system, consolidate UI components into single StoryFlow, and update processors to use new registry pattern.

userStories.title: Delete obsolete files
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want to remove obsolete files so that the codebase is clean and maintainable.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.

userStories.title: Create env example
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want an updated .env.example so that new providers are documented.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.

userStories.title: Create AI config module
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a centralized config module so that provider/model mappings are the single source of truth.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/config.ts with ActionType and ModelConfig types
Export ACTIONS record mapping action types to provider/model arrays
Export getCredentials function that reads env vars by provider name
Support generateText, generateImage, generateAudio action types

userStories.title: Create AI registry module
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a registry module so that providers can be registered and executed with automatic fallback.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Define Provider interface with optional handlers for each action
Implement registerProvider function to add providers to map
Implement execute function that tries providers in order from config
Log provider attempts and failures to console

userStories.title: Create void provider
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a void provider so that text and image generation works via void API.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement generateText handler with streaming SSE response parsing
Implement generateImage handler with multimodal content support

userStories.title: Create naga provider
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a naga provider so that audio generation works via naga API.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.

userStories.title: Create air provider
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want an air provider so that image generation fallback works via air API.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement generateImage handler supporting base64 and URL responses

userStories.title: Create providers index
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a providers index file so that all providers are auto-registered on import.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Import void, naga, and air providers

userStories.title: Create flows types
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want consolidated types so that all flow-related types are in one place.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Define Segment interface with text, type, entities, imagePrompt, imagePath

userStories.title: Create scene-visualizer processor
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a scene visualizer processor so that scene descriptions are generated from segments.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse JSON response with markdown code block extraction
Extract entities from image prompts when consistency enabled

userStories.title: Create image-generator processor
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want an image generator processor so that images are generated using the registry.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement resolveImage helper for local file conversion to data URL
Handle reference images and system prompts

userStories.title: Create audio-generator processor
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want an audio generator processor so that audio is generated and saved to disk.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement audioDir helper for project-scoped paths
Implement generateAndSave helper for single audio generation
Implement generateAudio function with batch processing and retries
Process batches in parallel with staggered delays

userStories.title: Create commentator processor
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a commentator processor so that comments are generated with commentator personality.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse JSON response with markdown code block extraction
Map response items to Segment types (comment or scene_text)

userStories.title: Create consolidated hooks
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want all hooks in one file so that they are easy to maintain and import.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement useAudio hook with generate and regenerateBatch
Implement useTranscription hook with transcribe and retry
Implement useVideo hook with generate and render with SSE progress
Implement useProject hook with load and save

userStories.title: Create StoryFlow component
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a single StoryFlow component so that the UI is consolidated and maintainable.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Define Stage type with all pipeline stages
Implement getStages helper filtering by mode and consistency
Implement stage state management with maxStep calculation
Implement all stage render sections (input, commentator, comments, descriptions, entities, images, audio, transcription, video)
Implement exec object with per-stage action logic
Implement bottom bar with back/execute/next buttons
Support both simple and commentator modes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update Home page
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want an updated home page so that users can select flow type and manage projects.

Context: Read prd.md in the root directory for the full specification and code references.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement project list with delete functionality

userStories.title: Update API routes
